author: lOrm
content: Already addressed by #481 (commit a01144b7 "fix: bulk tiny — #478 #481 #491 #493 #494"). src/tools/file/list.rs:21-44 replaces entries.flatten() with an explicit Ok/Err match emitting tracing::warn! for every unreadable DirEntry. Regression test list_files_logs_unreadable_entries_instead_of_dropping pins the behavior. Closing as duplicate-of-already-fixed.
